brand-story-img-5f6a7b.query:
Designed to Last, Made to Treasure Velmora was born from a belief that fine jewelry should be both beautiful and accessible. 
              Each piece is crafted with 18K gold plating and ethically sourced materials, designed 
              in London and brought to life by master artisans.
